_meta.description: Schema for work-task-definitions.json — Phase 2 task definitions for /work command. Referenced by CommandsSrc/work.md Phase 2 section.

tasks.description: Ordered list of Phase 2 tasks. Consumers create one TaskCreate per entry, in this order. Conditional entries (those with a non-'always' condition) are created OR explicitly skipped with a one-line note — never silently omitted.

order.description: Display order (1..N). Must match array index + 1.

subject.description: Task subject. Becomes the TaskCreate subject verbatim.

condition.description: Creation condition. 'always' means unconditional; other values are JS-like predicates evaluated against the preamble envelope context/flags.

description.description: Rationale for the task. Becomes the TaskCreate description — captures WHY this task exists.
